mapper.delete: delete from kb_basic_trash t where t.basic_id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_basic_trash t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbBasicTrashEntity.id},'%')
AND t.basic_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicTrashEntity.basicId},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicTrashEntity.userId},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbBasicTrashEntity.createTime},'%')
and t.type like concat('%',#{kbBasicTrashEntity.type},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
